utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ooh , I have to tell you something .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: But I can not tell you .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , but would not it be easier if you had to tell me something that you could tell me .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , sure in a perfect world . But , no , I promised I would not tell , and I swore to like all my gods .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay . Does it have to do with Ross and Rachel ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Does it have to do with Joey ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_Does it have to do with Joey ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Does it have to do with ... with Chandler and that sock that he keeps by his bed ?

emotion_cause.span: 11_Does it have to do with ... with Chandler and that sock that he keeps by his bed ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: No , but let come back to that later !
